positive: A symmetrical, highly detailed central composition featuring bioluminescent cosmic flora and ethereal celestial elements, forming a decorative circular mandala design. The subject is a stylized, abstract representation of a glowing lotus flower intertwined with swirling nebula dust and intricate geometric filigree. Use a style combining deep space art and Art Nouveau illustration, rendered in clean, crisp linework with a strong contrast ratio. Color palette should utilize deep indigo, cosmic violet, cyan teal, and accents of luminous gold and pale magenta. The light source emanates softly from the flora itself, creating strong backlighting and glowing edges. The overall aesthetic must be suitable for large-scale, high-contrast textile printing, with clean silhouettes and depth achieved through intricate negative space detailing. Perfect central focus, visually arresting, highly ornamental.
